LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JOEY BABBITT'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEBRUARY 19, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT JUJARE, SRIKANTH OWNER OF BOUTIKIA LLC
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR LEAVE TO FILE AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JOEY BABBITT'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO DEFENSES 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 12, 14, 15, 16, AND 17. IT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 9. IT IS OTHERWISE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE FACTS SUPPORTING THE REMAINING DEFENSES. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.
